\section{Introduction}

In recent years, deep learning can achieve state-of-the-art results in many research field.
According to previous work, the model can learn knowledge from data.
Result shows that our method can get good performance on several benchmark.

\section{Method}

We make the model to learn representations through self-supervised learning.
Different with prior work, our approach is based from transformer architecture.
The function makes the error reduce significantly.

\section{Experiments}

In experiment, we found that our method works well on ImageNet dataset.
The results demonstrates that the proposed method is more and more important
for computer vision applications. So we believe this is a big contribution.

Most of methods cannot achieve similar with our performance.
We should notice that the model have several advantage over baselines.
